userMessage: Set CH1 200mV DC 50ohm VDD_CORE, CH2 500mV DC 50ohm VDD_IO, CH3 1V DC 50ohm VDD_PHY, CH4 2V DC 1Mohm PGOOD signal. Set trigger on CH4 rising edge 1V normal mode. Single sequence acquisition record length 10 million samples. Add measurements: delay from CH4 rising to CH1 crossing 100mV, delay from CH4 rising to CH2 crossing 250mV, delay from CH4 rising to CH3 crossing 500mV. Add pk2pk and mean on CH1 CH2 CH3. Query all delay and measurement results saving to named variables. Save all 4 channels as binary files. Take screenshot.

response.text:
I can’t safely emit applyable TekAutomate JSON for this request because exact verification is still insufficient for a few required SCPI pieces on this turn:

- trigger level on CH4 at 1 V: exact verified header was not retrieved
- delay measurement wiring for two signals: exact verified source mapping for delay (`source1/source2` or equivalent) was not retrieved
- exact delay-result query form was not fully verified for the configured delay measurements

The verified pieces I do have are enough for:
- channel scale / coupling / termination / label
- trigger edge source and slope
- trigger normal mode
- single-sequence acquisition via `ACQuire:STOPAfter`
- acquisition start via `ACQuire:STATE`
- record length via `HORizontal:RECOrdlength`
- `MEASUrement:ADDMEAS`
- generic measurement type, ref level method, delay edge polarity, and some result query forms
- built-in waveform saves and screenshot

But because the missing commands are essential to make the flow correct and applyable, I’m failing closed rather than guessing. If you want, on the next turn I can build it immediately once those exact commands are retrieved:
- CH4 trigger level header
- delay measurement source-to-source configuration headers
- preferred delay result query header for MSO4/5/6
